allow: PowerShell($out = git ls-remote https://github.com/tomtrees17/alupanelcrm.git 2>&1 | Out-String; if \([string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace\($out\)\) { Write-Output "EMPTY_OR_NO_REFS" } else { Write-Output $out })
PowerShell($php = Get-Command php -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($php\) { Write-Output "PHP_PATH: $\($php.Source\)"; php -v } else { Write-Output "PHP_NOT_FOUND" })
